mapper.select: SELECT cm.*, u.real_name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.user_type FROM conversation_members cm JOIN sys_user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.is_left = 0 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cm.role DESC, cm.joined_at ASC
SELECT conversation_id FROM conversation_members WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_left = 0 AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT cm.*, u.real_name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.user_type FROM conversation_members cm JOIN sys_user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND cm.is_left = 0 AND cm.is_deleted = 0

SELECT cm.*, u.real_name as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.user_type FROM conversation_members cm JOIN sys_user u ON cm.user_id = u.id WHERE cm.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND cm.is_left = 0 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cm.role DESC, cm.joined_at ASC
